name: re-prompt
description: Run re-prompt prompt coaching from inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Coach prompts from local Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Use re-prompt from Codex to inspect local stored Codex sessions, analyze the user's own wording, and rewrite better prompts in the user's voice without uploading raw transcripts.
defaultPrompt: Use re-prompt to coach my latest Codex session prompt
Preview AGENTS.md rules from recent sessions
